column1: Do you use public transport? Russian cities provide a wide____________of ways to travel around, including buses. trams, and trolley-buses. (VARY)
Seven of the largest Russian cities, such as Yekaterinburg, Samara and Kazan, have an underground metro system. This is very___________, especially when it's cold! (USE)
For______________who want or need to fly, there are more than 1200 airports in Russia. (TRAVEL)
Flights from Pulkovo Airport in Saint Petersburg often go to other countries. For this reason, the airport is often called Pulkovo_____________Airport. (NATION)
Moscow is sometimes known as "the port of the five seas", due its river and canal____________to five seas, including the Black Sea and the Caspian Sea. (CONNECT)
The Trans-Siberian Railway is an___________long railway. It takes more than 6 days to travel from Moscow to Vladivostok. (EXTREME)
My dream finally come true. I had arrived in the truly____________city Rome. (AMAZE)
Looking at the beautiful and ancient buildings everywhere, I felt so small and___________. What had I ever done to make the world a better place? (IMPORTANT)
Wandering through churches, museums and galleries, I thought about all the great___________who had created the famous works of art than filled them. (ART)
After a day of exploring the historic centre, I returned to my hotel____________exhausted. (TOTAL)
But, I was determined to enjoy every second of my stay there. In the evening, I booked a table at a very stylish and_____________restaurant. (FASHION)
As i knew it would, the view from the table on the restaurant terrace______________took my breath away. I was in padise! (ABSOLUTE)
